message:
feat(http): add enforce_allowlist flag for strict deny-all-when-empty mode

Add enforce_allowlist boolean to HttpConnectorConfig that, when true,
causes an empty allowlist to deny all outbound hosts rather than
permitting all (the previous default behavior).

This enables a fail-closed posture for extensions that declare network
egress intent but provide no explicit host allowlist — with
enforce_allowlist=true, they cannot reach any host until the allowlist
is explicitly populated.

- New field: enforce_allowlist (default: false for backward compat)
- Updated validate_url: requires_allowlist = enforce_allowlist ||
  !allowlist.is_empty(), so empty + enforced = deny all
- Added test: test_url_validation_enforced_allowlist_denies_when_empty
- Updated existing serialization round-trip test with new field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
